## Review Classification
Classify each review finding as:
- P0-critical: Must fix before proceeding
- P1-high: Should fix; blocking if unresolved
- P2-medium: Should address in current cycle
- P3-low: Consider for future improvement
- P4-suggestion: Optional enhancement
